prompt: A side-by-side comparison image presented as two stacked documentary-style photographs of the same cramped old Chinese apartment corridor, framed by a black filmstrip border with white sprocket holes on both left and right edges. The top half is labeled {argument name="top label" default="GPT-image-2"} in large bold white sans-serif text centered near the top, and the bottom half is labeled {argument name="bottom label" default="Nano Banana 2"} in the same style. Create a gritty, nostalgic, cinematic scene in a long, narrow shared hallway of a worn residential building from the late 20th century, with peeling paint, stained walls, faded propaganda posters and old newspapers on the walls, dark wooden doorways, hanging towels and laundry, a damp concrete floor, and daylight coming from a window at the far end. In the upper scene, show exactly 4 people: 1 adult standing at the left cooking over a small stove on a wooden table with visible steam, 1 adult man sitting deeper in the corridor beside an electric fan, 1 child crouching in the center playing near a basin on the wet floor, and 1 adult woman seated at a small table on the right writing or reading; include enamel mugs, metal pots, stools, buckets, thermos containers, and cluttered household items. In the lower scene, show exactly 4 people again: 1 adult woman at the left cooking at a stove with smoke rising, 1 adult man seated on the right in a bamboo chair leaning over a tabletop fan, 1 child crouching in front writing on paper on a low stool, and 1 distant adult figure near the back window; add more visible corridor clutter including a bicycle front wheel at lower left, wash basins, baskets, thermoses, shelves, shoes, and hanging clothes. Keep the camera straight-on and centered to emphasize the corridor depth, with realistic human proportions, candid slice-of-life behavior, muted aged colors, soft natural light, high detail, photojournalistic realism, and a subtle difference in arrangement between the top and bottom scenes while preserving the same overall environment and mood.
translatedPrompt: 一张并排对比图，呈现为两张堆叠的纪实风格照片，展示同一个狭窄的老式中国公寓走廊，两侧带有带白色齿孔的黑色胶片边框。上半部分在顶部中央标有大号加粗白色无衬线文本 {argument name="top label" default="GPT-image-2"}，下半部分以相同样式标有 {argument name="bottom label" default="Nano Banana 2"}。创建一个粗粝、怀旧且具有电影感的场景，表现 20 世纪末破旧住宅楼内狭长的公共走廊，墙面剥落、污渍斑斑，贴有褪色的宣传海报和旧报纸，配有深色木门、悬挂的毛巾和衣物、潮湿的水泥地面，远处的窗户透进自然光。在上半部分场景中，准确展示 4 个人物：1 名成年人站在左侧，在木桌上的小炉子旁做饭，蒸汽清晰可见；1 名成年男性坐在走廊深处，旁边放着电风扇；1 名儿童蹲在中央，在潮湿的地面上玩耍；1 名成年女性坐在右侧的小桌旁写字或阅读；包含搪瓷杯、金属锅、凳子、水桶、暖水瓶和杂乱的家居用品。在下半部分场景中，再次准确展示 4 个人物：1 名成年女性在左侧炉灶旁做饭，烟雾升起；1 名成年男性坐在右侧的竹椅上，身体前倾靠近台式风扇；1 名儿童蹲在前面，在矮凳上的纸上写字；1 名成年人影出现在后方窗户附近；增加更多可见的走廊杂物，包括左下角的自行车前轮、洗脸盆、篮子、暖水瓶、架子、鞋子和悬挂的衣物。保持相机正对且居中，以强调走廊的深度，人物比例写实，展现真实的生活片段，色调柔和陈旧，自然光柔和，细节丰富，具有新闻摄影的真实感，并在保持整体环境和氛围一致的同时，使上下场景的布局呈现细微差异。

breakdown.creativeCore: Stacked Corridor 模型对比：此提示词可生成一张双联胶片风格的对比图，展示两个写实的老式公寓走廊场景渲染，适用于视觉模型对比文章。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.text: 要求精确文字；包含标注/说明
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 怀旧照片、纪实场景、人物生活方式、品牌氛围图

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 摄影/真实场景 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, cinematic, documentary]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: natural light, camera]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字；包含标注/说明。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
